def normalize(s):
    # Remove diacritics
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', s) if not unicodedata.combining(ch))
    # unify alef forms
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s2 = s2.replace('ة','ه')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'[_ـ]+','', s2)
    # collapse spaces
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s2).strip().lower()
    return s2

def similarity(a,b):
    a_norm=normalize(a)
    b_norm=normalize(b)
    # Token F1: compute precision and recall on tokens
    tokens_a = set(a_norm.split())
    tokens_b = set(b_norm.split())
    inter = tokens_a & tokens_b
    if tokens_a or tokens_b:
        precision = len(inter)/len(tokens_a) if tokens_a else 0
        recall = len(inter)/len(tokens_b) if tokens_b else 0
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0
    else:
        f1=0
    # LCS normalized by length of longer
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None,a_norm,b_norm)
    lcs = sum(triple.size for triple in sm.get_matching_blocks())
    lcs_norm = lcs/max(1,len(b_norm),len(a_norm))
    # average
    return f1, lcs_norm
